interactions.stageContent: {"slideNotes":[{"slideId":"slide-cloud-001","notes":"Section: Cloud Infrastructure — End-to-end migration from on-premise to AWS/Azure/GCP; hybrid cloud management for gradual transition; containerization and Kubernetes orchestration; average 40% infrastructure cost reduction","purpose":"Cloud Migration & Modernization"},{"slideId":"slide-cloud-002","notes":"Section: Cloud Infrastructure — Terraform and Pulumi for automated provisioning; GitOps-driven deployment pipelines; environment parity across dev/staging/production; self-healing infrastructure with auto-scaling","purpose":"Infrastructure as Code"},{"slideId":"slide-data-001","notes":"Section: Data Analytics — Modern lakehouse architecture on Databricks/Snowflake; real-time streaming with Kafka and Flink; data quality frameworks with automated monitoring; unified governance across all data assets","purpose":"Data Platform Architecture"},{"slideId":"slide-data-002","notes":"Section: Data Analytics — Executive dashboards with Looker/Tableau; self-service analytics for business users; embedded analytics in customer-facing products; ML-powered anomaly detection and forecasting","purpose":"Business Intelligence & Visualization"},{"slideId":"slide-sec-001","notes":"Section: Security — Identity-based access control with SSO/SAML; network micro-segmentation and east-west traffic monitoring; endpoint detection and response (EDR) integration; continuous security posture assessment","purpose":"Zero Trust Architecture"},{"slideId":"slide-sec-002","notes":"Section: Security — SOC 2 Type II certification support; GDPR and CCPA compliance frameworks; automated audit trail and evidence collection; policy-as-code for continuous compliance","purpose":"Compliance & Governance"},{"slideId":"slide-summary-001","notes":"Section: Summary — Cloud + Data + Security = Complete digital transformation; shared platform foundation reduces total cost; cross-domain team collaboration and knowledge sharing; single vendor accountability across all workstreams","purpose":"Integrated Capability View"},{"slideId":"slide-summary-002","notes":"Section: Summary — Phase 1: Assessment and roadmap (2 weeks); Phase 2: Foundation implementation (6 weeks); Phase 3: Capability buildout (8 weeks); Ongoing: Managed services and optimization","purpose":"Engagement Model"}]}
